title: Episode 3 — Musk vs OpenAI (v16 + live audience)
description: Same v16-juliet-fix debate, framed as a live stage event: light auditorium reverb on the voices, a high-pass roll-off to mimic dynamic-mic character, and a continuous live-audience bed at -28 dB underneath. A/B against the dry and fireplace variants — which framing fits the debate.
summary: Same v16-juliet-fix debate, framed as a live stage event: light auditorium reverb on the voices, a high-pass roll-off to mimic dynamic-mic character, and a continuous live-audience bed at -28 dB underneath. A/B against the dry and fireplace variants — which framing fits the debate.
